market_context.insider_activity_summary: Semiconductor insiders sold $122M AMD shares last 3 months; cautious positioning across tech ahead of SpaceX IPO

key_themes: Iran de-escalation rally after Trump announces deal near completion
SpaceX IPO June 12 at $135/share ($1.77T valuation) drives tech rotation
Semiconductor rebound from -11% selloff as geopolitical risk eases
brief.macro_summary: CPI 4.2% YoY Wednesday matched expectations, PPI 6.5% Thursday morning exceeded at 1.1% monthly. Fed rate hike December fully priced. Iran deal optimism eased oil from $92 to $86.
brief.afterhours_summary: Futures rallied 0.7-0.9% after Trump suspended Iran strikes and signaled peace deal signing soon. Semiconductor stocks Intel +7%, Micron +6% in pre-market rebound.
brief.geopolitical_summary: US-Iran breakthrough drives risk-on sentiment. Trump canceled tonight's strikes, expects deal signing this weekend in Europe. Oil dropped 4%, VIX fell 12%.

sectors.name: Technology
sectors.reason: Semiconductor rebound +6-9% after -11% panic selloff; SpaceX IPO catalyzes AI infrastructure rotation

sectors.name: Energy
sectors.reason: WTI crude -4% to $86 on Iran peace deal; oil shock narrative reversing rapidly

sectors.name: Consumer Staples
sectors.reason: Defensive rotation: PG +5%, KO hit all-time highs Wednesday; inflation hedge positioning

sectors.name: Industrials
sectors.reason: Caterpillar +1.8% leads Dow; mixed World Cup hiring boost vs. rate-hike fears

sectors.name: Financials
sectors.reason: 2nd-worst sector YTD; 10Y yield 4.55% caps upside but MetLife hit ATH Wednesday

picks.thesis_macro: Iran de-escalation cuts oil, eases inflation fears; chip rebound from oversold -11% panic
picks.thesis_technical: Bounced hard from $99 support; pre-market +7% gaps above 50-day MA at $103
picks.thesis_catalyst: BofA upgrade on soaring CPU orders; Alphabet foundry contract validation Monday drives 8.5% pop
picks.thesis_short_interest: Short interest 12% creates squeeze potential on turnaround momentum
picks.thesis_insider: Low recent insider activity; no major Form 4 sales
picks.thesis_volume: Pre-market volume 3x average confirms institutional accumulation on weakness
picks.thesis_correlation: Uncorrelated to SpaceX hype; foundry business different from AI inference chips
picks.thesis_risk: Still burning cash in foundry; turnaround execution risk remains elevated
picks.entry_logic: $105.50 captures gap-up open above Wednesday close $99.17
picks.exit_logic: $116 is 200-day MA resistance and pre-selloff level from June 3
picks.probability_reasoning: Oversold bounce + geopolitical relief + upgrade catalyst align for 2-day mean reversion play
catalysts: SpaceX IPO lifting all chip boats

picks.thesis_macro: Iran deal eases memory supply chain fears; AI data center demand intact despite smartphone crash
picks.thesis_technical: Gapped up +6% pre-market; reclaiming $1050 pivot after -13% Thursday/Friday cascade
picks.thesis_catalyst: High-bandwidth memory essential for AI servers; SpaceX data center buildout narrative supportive
picks.thesis_options: Put volume spiked Friday; reversal setup as hedges get unwound
picks.thesis_short_interest: Short interest 8%; moderate squeeze potential on bounce
picks.thesis_volume: Pre-market volume 2.5x average signals conviction on de-escalation trade
picks.thesis_correlation: Pure AI memory play; uncorrelated to Intel foundry or AMD data center chips
picks.thesis_risk: IDC warned smartphone market -13% YoY creates headwind for consumer memory segment
picks.entry_logic: $1070 is gap-open level above Wednesday close $1004
picks.exit_logic: $1150 targets 61.8% Fibonacci retracement of June 4-5 selloff
picks.probability_reasoning: Oversold + geopolitical relief vs. fundamental smartphone demand weakness limits upside to 7-8%
catalysts: SpaceX IPO halo effect on AI infrastructure
Memory shortage narrative for data centers

picks.thesis_macro: Defensive rotation persists; CPI 4.2% supports pricing power; Morgan Stanley top pick

picks.exit_logic: $86.50 is psychological resistance and 50% of path to MS $89 target

Q2 earnings beat on pricing power

picks.thesis_macro: Iran deal lowers oil/commodity costs; World Cup infrastructure boost evident in May jobs +172K
picks.thesis_technical: Leading Dow gainer +1.84% Thursday; holding above 50-day MA at $410
picks.thesis_catalyst: Energy cost relief improves margin outlook; commodity supercycle thesis intact but costs easing
picks.thesis_short_interest: Short interest 3%; limited squeeze potential but no overhang
picks.thesis_volume: Volume 1.3x average Thursday; institutional rotation into cyclicals on peace narrative
picks.thesis_correlation: Uncorrelated to tech; bridges defensive (staples) and cyclical (industrials) positioning
picks.thesis_risk: Fed rate hike December fully priced limits industrial loan demand; construction cycle peaking

picks.exit_logic: $432 is May 2026 swing high resistance; 4% move fits 2-day cyclical bounce

picks.thesis_macro: Consumer resilience despite CPI 4.2%; off-price retail benefits from inflation-squeezed shoppers

picks.thesis_short_interest: Short interest 2.5%; minimal squeeze but confirms low bearish sentiment
picks.thesis_volume: Volume above average on ATH confirms institutional interest
picks.thesis_correlation: Uncorrelated to tech/chip/energy volatility; pure consumer defensive discretionary play

brief.portfolio_note: Balanced allocation: 42% semiconductors (INTC, MU) for oversold bounce, 38% defensives (KO, TJX) for VIX hedge, 20% cyclicals (CAT) for Iran relief. Total $100K deployed. SpaceX IPO Friday creates volatility risk; stops tight. Holdings 1-3 days capture mean reversion without overnight geopolitical exposure.
risks: SpaceX IPO June 12 could suck liquidity from all other names; violent rotation risk
Iran deal fails to materialize by weekend; oil spikes back, reversing Thursday rally
PPI 6.5% feeds into Friday Consumer Sentiment print; inflation fears resurface
Semiconductor rebound is dead-cat bounce; Broadcom guidance miss fundamental not technical
VIX 19.5 still elevated; one headline reverses entire rally in minutes
brief.data_freshness: All data current as of Thursday June 11, 2026 08:00 ET. Pre-market prices estimated from 7:47am futures snapshot. VIX, 10Y, DXY, oil, gold from Wednesday close + Thursday pre-market moves. SpaceX IPO details confirmed from multiple sources June 9-11.
